best_cases.prompt: What type of environment is shown in this image?
What animal do you see in this image?
Describe the landscape in this image.
What is the person doing in this image?
Describe the scene in this image in detail.

worst_cases.prompt: Describe the composition and spatial layout of this image.
What technology or electronic devices do you see in this image?
What specific food items can you identify in this image?
What text can you read in this image?
Count the number of distinct objects visible in this image.
